overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a frost-covered rural village and surrounding wilderness. The character traverses dirt paths, crosses a shallow stream with deer, and approaches a tall stone tower under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path with wooden huts and stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the village path past wooden huts and stone walls

entered.detail: wooden village hut with straw roof and timber framing
low stone wall lining the dirt path
tall leafless tree with twisted bare branches
wooden fence and debris along the path edge
tall ruined stone tower visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a rural village outskirts. Wooden huts with thatched roofs line the left side while stone walls run along the right. A large dead tree stands prominently ahead, and a distant stone tower is visible on the horizon. The ground is a frost-covered dirt trail with sparse vegetation.

events.description: encounter a group of deer drinking at the stream edge
pass by a fallen person in colorful clothing lying on the ground to the right

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow stream, passing deer on the left bank and a fallen body on the right

notable_agents.action: group of deer standing alert near the water's edge
fallen person in blue and red clothing lying face down on the ground

entered.detail: shallow flowing water crossing the path with visible stream bed
broken wooden wagon with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow stream crossing where a group of deer stands on the left bank. A fallen person lies on the ground to the right near a ruined wooden cart. The stone wall from the previous segment now appears on the left side in the distance as the camera moves through the water.

agents.ego_description: climbing weathered stone steps through ancient ruined structures

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward through the terrain
crumbling stone tower structure with broken walls
small wooden lean-to structure with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a set of ancient stone stairs through ruined structures. A crumbling stone tower stands to the right while a small wooden shed appears nearby. The distant stone tower from earlier segments is now noticeably closer as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching the stone tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding forest path toward the tall stone tower

entered.detail: thick evergreen pine trees lining both sides of the path
snow-capped mountain visible behind the tower

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking through a dense pine forest on a dirt trail. The tall stone tower now dominates the center view as the camera approaches. Snow-capped mountains are visible in the far distance to the right, and the surrounding vegetation is thick with evergreen trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the frost-covered outskirts of a rural village toward a towering stone structure nestled in a pine forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail lined with thatched wooden huts and stone walls, passing a prominent dead tree while a distant tower looms on the horizon. As the path leads into a shallow stream, the camera moves past a group of deer and a ruined cart before the terrain shifts upward into a series of ancient stone stairs and crumbling ruins. The scene then opens into a dense evergreen forest, where the elevation increase brings the stone tower into dominant view. Finally, the camera advances along a forest trail toward the tower, revealing snow-capped mountains in the far distance under an overcast winter sky.
